steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content:
The function is
$$
f(x)=\frac{x+10}{3}
$$
To find $f(-7)$, replace $x$ with $-7$. The input goes only in the numerator expression.

steps.title: Evaluate the fraction
steps.content: Compute the numerator first, then divide by $3$: $$ f(-7)=\frac{-7+10}{3}=\frac{3}{3}=1 $$ The answer is C.
